def positive_full_collection_sorted_when_partial_order_or_selection_suffices():
    rule_id = "full_collection_sorted_when_partial_order_or_selection_suffices"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag full sorts used where top-k or one-pass selection would work."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
